name: v2 sudo activity burst
description: Three or more Falco sudo-execution events on a single host within 10 minutes. Concentrated sudo bursts are unusual under steady-state baseline and capture two patterns of interest: legitimate oncall response (svc identities + sre.* taking corrective action) and interactive attacker activity post-shell. Rule fires regardless of hour; the off-hours-vs-work-hours distinction is left to investigation analysis via the alert @timestamp. Triage answers which identity drove the burst, what change-mgmt window was active (if any), and whether the host is currently in an incident state.
